explanation: The response correctly identifies the latency-bound bottleneck with HIGH confidence, cites specific metric values (98.6% stall_long_scoreboard, 0.1% DRAM BW utilization, 99.2% occupancy, 0.02 FLOP/byte), and correctly attributes the bottleneck to dependent load latency and cache-hit latency rather than the misleading signal of high global load volume or DRAM bandwidth.
